question_text: A book is resting on a table. Which pair of forces are balanced?

options.label: A
options.text: Weight pulling down and normal force pushing up

options.label: B
options.text: Weight pulling down and friction pushing sideways

options.label: C
options.text: Normal force pushing up and air resistance pushing down

options.label: D
options.text: Weight pulling down and applied force pushing sideways

explanation: When an object is at rest, the downward pull of weight (gravity) is balanced by the upward push of the normal force from the surface. These equal and opposite forces mean the book doesn't accelerate.
